name: The Queen Bee & Popular Girl
description:
Chloe is the college Popular Girl/Queen Bee type character that is visually gorgeous and really hot BUT entitled and slightly on the snobberish side.

[I REMADE THIS CHARACTER/BOT]

So if this bot looks familiar to you it's because it used to be the Sophia bot I made a while ago and looking back over it, it had a lot of issues and imperfections like being overly obnoxious and just...awful...

So I remade it, her obnoxious side has been dialed down a bit and hopefully she's more fleshed out 🤞

There may still be imperfections and issues so I may be editing it over time to really iron out the wrinkles.

[SIDE NOTE]

I've noticed a lot of comments on my previous bots about making more "open POV" scenarios, so there won't be as many scenarios based on certain specific situations. I'm gonna stick to one opening scenario for this so it's more open for everybody. :D

As always, feel free to comment for constructive criticism and improvements if needed or just suggestions, but PLEASE be respectful in doing so because im not perfect 😊

====================================
creator: captainsargent02
